violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The wooden shelves in the kitchen area have exposed wood and missing laminate around the sprayer hose and under the microwave.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The bottom of the glass door cooler in the kitchen needs to be cleaned. The backs of the monitors over the hot holding cabinets need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of vinyl gloves was stored on the floor under the hand sink in the kitchen. A box of foam hinged containers was stored on the floor in the corner of the kitchen by the employee coats.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. The hot water valve on the meat department sink is leaking.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the oven needs in the deli area needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile in the meat and produce areas.
